title: The Mutant Bazaar
description: Under a tarp of stitched hides, a four-armed trader fans out salvage across a battered table. Every price is a starting price — if you can talk fast enough.

options.text: Pay full price for a charm trinket
options.result: You count out the coin without quibbling. The trader's four hands wrap your purchase and slide it across the table.

options.text: [Charm 6] Haggle him down to a steal
options.result: Your patter is silk. He laughs, throws in a Repair Kit for the road, and even refunds a handful of coin to keep your favor.
You drift the stalls, trade a few quiet words, and leave a touch more practiced at reading a room.
